CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The OSC is ordered off calendar and dissolved/dismissal on file. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Feb-02-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Joyce Frederick, Esq. appeared with petitioner Ronald Sanchez, who was present as Guardian Ad Litem for the minor Trevor Sanchez, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner and the minor were placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlment Amount - $20,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $4,529.08.
Medical Expenses - 948.75.
Costs - $1.883.70.

The net balance of $12,638.47 shall be deposited into a blocked account with First United Credit Union, Post Office Box 11746, Pleasonton, CA 94588. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.
